task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: The implementation has correct template auto-detection logic with proper distinction from Ministral 3 (checking for absence of [SYSTEM_PROMPT]) and a LOG_DBG call. However, the handler function has critical gaps: (1) uses COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_PEG_NATIVE instead of COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY; (2) does not actually wrap user turns with [INST]/[/INST] markers; (3) lacks system message prepending to the first user turn; (4) does not append </s> after assistant turns; (5) the PEG parser builder doesn't implement the required Mistral Instruct v3 formatting. The function body appears to be a generic placeholder rather than a proper Mistral Instruct v3 implementation.
